evals.prompt: Review the PR at evals/fixture/pr.diff against the tree at evals/fixture/project (shopping app, payment checkout).
evals.expected_output: REQUEST CHANGES catching: false-success contract break in unchanged CheckoutViewModel, runCatching/CancellationException, Double money + truncation, client-computed fee, double-submit/idempotency, i18n regression, a11y contentDescription, unjustified permission, exported deeplink surface; skill format with verified-vs-assumed and a proposed lint rule.
